rag_rules: Fuse a generated annex only into the declaration whose ownership and scope match the block's intended level.
Preserve the existing AADL architecture verbatim outside the inserted annex text; use the model as the source of declaration boundaries.
generic_rules: Keep edits minimal and localized to annex insertion.
Do not move content between component type and component implementation scopes.
Leave subcomponents, connections, features, properties, and names unchanged during fusion.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE content is wrapped in a standard annex block with normal AADL annex delimiters and terminator.
Insert annex text at declaration scope, not inside feature, subcomponent, connection, or property lines.
anti_patterns: Do not infer a new owner when the generated block already implies its scope.
Do not repair expression semantics, rename identifiers, or restructure architecture while fusing.
irrelevant_topics: Using AADL property names or units as AGREE variables
Encoding plain event ports as numeric or Boolean values
